commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a validated `CLAWSWEEPER_CODEX_LOGIN_METHOD` env override shared by review, assist, commit-sweeper, and PR-close proof Codex subprocess configs, with unit tests.

Reproducibility: yes. current main hardcodes `forced_login_method="api"` in the four core Codex subprocess configs, matching the PR body's before-error for ChatGPT OAuth. I did not run a live OAuth flow in this read-only review, but the PR body includes terminal after-proof.
